symptom: chest discomfort after a sword swallowing performance
hook: a full length sword ran straight down the throat and chest into the stomach
whatYouSee: A long straight metal blade running down the throat and chest into the stomach.
whyItMatters: Sword swallowing is a performance feat that can perforate the food pipe and cause a life threatening chest infection.
treatment: Most cases pass uneventfully but a perforation needs urgent surgery and antibiotics.
takeaway: A long straight blade running down the food pipe into the stomach is a swallowed sword.

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with chest discomfort after a sword swallowing performance.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And a full length sword ran straight down the throat and chest into the stomach.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What's the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Swallowed sword

👀 What you see:
A long straight metal blade running down the throat and chest into the stomach.

🦴 Why it matters:
Sword swallowing is a performance feat that can perforate the food pipe and cause a life threatening chest infection.

💊 Treatment:
Most cases pass uneventfully but a perforation needs urgent surgery and antibiotics.
